name: linear-card
title: Linear Card
description: A compound feature card inspired by Linear's design language. Supports image and reactive SVG content variants with a minimal, editorial layout.

props.name: children
props.description: Card content - compose with the sub-components below

props.name: isLast
props.description: When true, removes the right border so the last card in a row sits flush

subComponents.name: LinearCardHeader
subComponents.description: Mono micro-label displayed above the card media. Hidden on mobile

subComponents.name: LinearCardHeading
subComponents.description: Primary heading inside the card body

subComponents.name: LinearCardSubheading
subComponents.description: Muted description text inside the card body

subComponents.name: LinearCardBody
subComponents.description: Wrapper for heading + subheading. Provides vertical flex layout and small text size

props.name: children
props.description: Body content - typically heading and subheading

subComponents.name: LinearCardImageContainer
subComponents.description: Fixed-size container for an image (relative positioned for next/image fill)

subComponents.name: LinearCardSVGContainer
subComponents.description: Fixed-size container for an SVG graphic with overflow hidden

props.name: children
props.description: An SVG element or reactive SVG component
